1 Landing Page First Look
interest Confidence 0.70

interest Confidence 0.60

anticipation Confidence 0.75

anticipation Confidence 0.85

6 Documentation Site

7 FAQ — Costs & Refund
trust Confidence 0.80

"Free hosting on Vercel, free MongoDB tier — launch for $0/month! Works with Cursor AI. But no refund... that's a risk. Average ship time is 7 days though. Libraries are independent, can swap freely."

⚠ No-refund policy increases hesitation for first-time buyers
8 Final Pricing Math
anticipation Confidence 0.85
